description: Add a blended winglet to the eCRM-001 wing model in OpenVSP following the geometry specification provided in ~/Desktop/winglet_spec.txt. You must modify the existing model by adding a new outboard wing section to the Wing component. Set its Dihedral (cant angle), Span (height), Sweep, and Taper Ratio to match the specification document. Once configured, save the modified model to ~/Documents/OpenVSP/eCRM001_winglet.vsp3.
